top_signals.title: China’s Gold Imports Surge After International Prices Slump
top_signals.summary: Chinese gold imports rose to a two-year high in June, underscoring resilient demand in the world’s biggest bullion market after a plunge in international prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s Katayama Says to Take Bold FX Steps Decisively as Needed
top_signals.summary: Japanese authorities will take bold steps to counter moves in the currency market decisively as needed, and a US Treasury report issued overnight underscores a shared view that excessive currency moves are undesirable, Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asian Oil Buyers in Talks to Reroute Saudi Red Sea Flows - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Asian Oil Buyers in Talks to Reroute Saudi Red Sea Flows  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tesla, Alphabet lose hundreds of billions in value in post-earnings stock plunge
top_signals.summary: Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian energy provider Origin says data breach exposes client data
top_signals.summary: Origin Energy has confirmed that an unauthorized party accessed and subsequently leaked customer data online, exposing sensitive personally identifiable information (PII), among others. [...]
